nasb.text: Woe to the proud crown of the drunkards of Ephraim, And to the fading flower of its glorious beauty, Which is at the head of the fertile valley Of those who are overcome with wine!

esv.text: Ah, the proud crown of the drunkards of Ephraim, and the fading flower of its glorious beauty, which is on the head of the rich valley of those overcome with wine!

cnv.text: 以法蓮那些醉漢所戴的高傲冠冕，有禍了！ 它在肥美谷山頂上的榮美，有禍了！ 它必如將殘的花朵， 滿了喝醉酒的人。

ccb.text: 以法莲酒徒引以为荣的华冠有祸了！ 它坐落在醉酒者肥美的山谷顶上， 它的荣美如将残之花。

csbs.text: 祸哉！以法莲酒徒的高傲冠冕—— 荣耀华美的将残之花！ 它就在醉酒人肥沃之谷的山顶上。
